java.$comment: jdtls wrapper script (brew install jdtls). JAVA_HOME (21+) must be exported in the launching shell — inherited by the spawned process; see references/lsp-install-guide.md.

cpp.$comment: clangd (bundled with the llvm brew formula on macOS; apt install clangd on Debian/Ubuntu). Defaults to stdio.

csharp.$comment: csharp-ls (dotnet tool install --global csharp-ls). MIT-licensed, actively maintained; chosen over OmniSharp per REQ-L-004/open-risk-#2. Defaults to stdio.

php.$comment: phpactor (curl-installed phar or composer global). MIT-licensed free alternative to intelephense's paid tier; chosen per REQ-L-004/open-risk-#5.

kotlin.$comment: Official JetBrains Kotlin LSP (brew install JetBrains/utils/kotlin-lsp). Supersedes the stale community fwcd/kotlin-language-server per REQ-L-004/open-risk-#3.

ruby.$comment: ruby-lsp (gem install ruby-lsp), Shopify-backed community-standard default. Defaults to stdio.

html.$comment: vscode-html-language-server (npm install -g vscode-langservers-extracted). Split from css per open-risk-#1 (separate binaries in the vscode-langservers-extracted family).

css.$comment: vscode-css-language-server (npm install -g vscode-langservers-extracted). Split from html per open-risk-#1 (separate binaries in the vscode-langservers-extracted family).
